name: Chubby Snacks Sandwiches Box
headline: Order ships & arrives separately from meals. | A better way to PB & J.
description:
Peanut butter and jelly is one of the most lovable combos out there, which is why Chubby Snacks made a better-for-you snack to deliver on those nostalgic flavors. Made with superfood jams, creamy nut butters, and whole-grain bread, these pre-packaged frozen sandwiches are high in protein and fiber with no added sugar. One order* contains the following sammies: Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam, Peanut Butter & Grape Jam, Almond Butter & Strawberry Jam, Almond Butter & Grape Jam, Sunflower Butter & Strawberry Jam, and Sunflower Butter & Grape Jam. Enjoy them ice cold from the freezer or warm them up in the toaster! 
*Your order will ship separately from your HF meals and may not arrive on your scheduled weekly delivery date (shipping is included in the total price). Customization of bundles is not available at this time.

ingredients.name: Chubby Snacks Almond Butter Strawberry Sandwich
Chubby Snacks Almond Butter Grape Sandwich
Chubby Snacks Sunflower Butter Strawberry Sandwich
Chubby Snacks Sunflower Butter Grape Sandwich

steps.instructions:
Enjoy! 
Click "download" for nutrition facts panels.
